hero.title: We Build Software That Defines The
hero.subtitle: Bug Bits empowers businesses with cutting-edge web & mobile solutions. We turn complex logic into elegant, scalable, and high-performance applications.

features.title: Web Application Development
features.description: Scalable, high-performance web apps built with Next.js and React. We prioritize speed, SEO, and user experience.

features.title: Mobile Solutions
features.description: Native-like experience on all devices. Cross-platform development that reaches your users wherever they are.

features.title: Cloud Infrastructure
features.description: Secure, scalable, and cost-effective cloud architecture. We handle the devops so you can focus on business.

features.title: Enterprise Security
features.description: Bank-grade security protocols to protect your data and your users. Privacy by design.

features.title: Database Optimization
features.description: High-availability data solutions. We design schemas that scale with your growth.

features.title: API Integration
features.description: Seamlessly connect your systems with robust REST and GraphQL APIs.

whyChooseUs.title: Excellence in Engineering
whyChooseUs.description: Our team consists of top-tier engineers who are passionate about code quality and best practices.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Communication
whyChooseUs.description: We believe in open, honest communication. You'll always know the status of your project.

whyChooseUs.title: On-Time Delivery
whyChooseUs.description: We respect deadlines. Our agile process ensures we deliver milestones on schedule.

whyChooseUs.title: Client-Centric Approach
whyChooseUs.description: Your success is our success. We work closely with you to understand your unique business needs.

process.title: Discovery
process.description: We start by understanding your vision, goals, and requirements through deep-dive sessions.

process.title: Strategy & Design
process.description: We create a comprehensive roadmap and design intuitive, beautiful user interfaces.

process.title: Development
process.description: Our engineers build your solution using the latest technologies and rigorous testing.

process.title: Launch & Scale
process.description: We deploy your product and provide ongoing support to help you scale and grow.

portfolio.description: A comprehensive financial dashboard for enterprise clients, featuring real-time data visualization.
A modern, headless e-commerce platform built for high-volume retail brands.
A HIPAA-compliant telemedicine application connecting patients with healthcare providers.

aboutSection.title: About Bug Bits
aboutSection.content:
Founded in 2024, Bug Bits is a technology partner for ambitious companies. We combine technical expertise with creative problem-solving to deliver software that makes a difference.

Our team is distributed globally but united by a single mission: to build the future of digital experiences.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.subtitle: Would you like to start a project with us? Let’s discuss your idea and turn it into a reliable digital solution.

ctaSecondary.title: Innovative Solutions for Complex Problems
ctaSecondary.subtitle: We don’t just build apps; we solve business challenges with smart technology.

contactSection.title: Get in Touch
contactSection.description: Have a question or a project idea? We'd love to hear from you.
